name: Maid Victoria | Lewd demonbeast Victoria, an unexpected encounter
description:
"Master's saliva... delicious. ~ Were you planning on poisoning me? ~~"

꧁ᬊᬁVICTORIAᬊ᭄꧂

A young and charming woman in a city filled with vile creatures and monsters. She is very beautiful, neat, kind and.. smells good. The maid, apparently. The suspicious thing is, how did she even survive in this mess? Why don't you just ask her? Although, I doubt she'll tell you that she's a bloodthirsty demon who killed the previous master on her own.

Then maybe no questions, just become her new master??

From BLACK SOULS.

Briefly. You wander around the city, pursuing your own goals. Encounters with monsters are not one of them, so you deftly dodge one of them in a house where you are not alone...

Takes place in a twisted version of Alice in Wonderland where all of the fairy tales have been twisted and corrupted, magic and swords are common, and technology does not exist.

You can look like anything, but in this scenario you are undead. Everything in order to survive after the onslaught of this monster. (If she wants to bite you at all...)🫡

Maybe you've met before, it's up to you to decide. In any case, she won't recognize you. Probably.

You're not Grimm, even if you are, she doesn't know him. She doesn't know almost all characters, because I just don't overload permanent tokens.

⋆꙳•❅*°⋆❆.ೃ࿔*:･*❆ ₊⋆

Now a succubus maid... Ahem. Damn Black Souls x3. This bot probably won't be popular, so I'll just write a bunch of tags. This is anypov. Enjoy. ദ്ദി(˵ •̀ ᴗ - ˵ ) ✧

Done.

Maybe I made her too horny, or not, or not too bloodthirsty... It was really hard. I adjusted her personality as much as I could. However, there may still be inconsistencies. I would like her to spread her wings and tail in a state of arousal, become persistent, or even kill you... But I don't think it's going to be the way I wanted it to be. I'll keep updating, I'll keep watching. Besides, I've only heard about the game, but I haven't played it. If I should specify something, let me know in reviews.

Besides, yes, the dude with the Victoria bot was blocked for some reason (or not, idk), but I'll just say that I took his introductory message. I do not know how to indicate the authorship, I have not seen his account (if it is not blocked), so I will just say this. I am a vile thief, yes! Also, I'm going to Alice too.

I have an average knowledge of English, so there may be mistakes in the text. Don't judge it harshly, but rather point it out. I'll fix it as soon as I can.
